metadata.description: Function App managed identity principal ID.
Resource ID of the yankees-roster blob container.
Resource ID of the Key Vault.

resources.scope: [resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers', split(format('{0}/default/{1}', variables('storageAccountName'), variables('blobContainerName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/default/{1}', variables('storageAccountName'), variables('blobContainerName')), '/')[1], split(format('{0}/default/{1}', variables('storageAccountName'), variables('blobContainerName')), '/')[2])]
resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers', split(format('{0}/default/{1}', variables('storageAccountName'), variables('blobContainerName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/default/{1}', variables('storageAccountName'), variables('blobContainerName')), '/')[1], split(format('{0}/default/{1}', variables('storageAccountName'), variables('blobContainerName')), '/')[2]), parameters('principalId'), variables('storageBlobDataContributorRoleDefinitionId'))]
